name: rhf-advanced-02
title: Form in a Dialog
description: Build an invoice while a dialog validates each line item against its own schema.

files.content:
'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { Controller, useForm } from 'react-hook-form' import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod' import { PlusIcon } from 'lucide-react' import * as z from 'zod' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger, } from '@/components/ui/dialog' import { Field, FieldError, FieldGroup, FieldLabel, } from '@/components/ui/field' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' export const lineItemSchema = z.object({ description: z.string().min(1, 'Describe the item.'), quantity: z .string() .min(1, 'Required.') .refine( (v) => Number.isInteger(Number(v)) && Number(v) >= 1, 'Use a whole number, 1 or more.', ), unitPrice: z .string() .min(1, 'Required.') .refine((v) => Number(v) > 0, 'Must be greater than 0.'), }) export type LineItem = z.infer const emptyItem: LineItem = { description: '', quantity: '1', unitPrice: '' } export function LineItemDialog({ onAdd, }: Readonly<{ onAdd: (item: LineItem) => void }>) { const [open, setOpen] = useState(false) const form = useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(lineItemSchema), defaultValues: emptyItem, }) function handleAdd(data: LineItem) { onAdd(data) form.reset(emptyItem) setOpen(false) } return ( { setOpen(next) if (!next) form.reset(emptyItem) }} > Add line item This item is validated on its own before it joins the invoice.
{ e.stopPropagation() void form.handleSubmit(handleAdd)(e) }} > ( Description {fieldState.invalid && ( )} )} />
( Quantity {fieldState.invalid && ( )} )} /> ( Unit price (USD) {fieldState.invalid && ( )} )} />
) }
